Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd218 On Oct.31,2002 At 9:00 Am
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. Present:Commissioner:Loretta M. Norris, Clerk:John Stokes, Reporter:Mitch Lyon. All parties present. Plaintiff represented byBarbara Staman, Esq. Witness:Susan Lynn Wallin, agent for Shartsis..., sworn and examined. Default was taken against Henry Grausz. the following exhibits were introduced into evidence: 1.Fee agreement 2.Letter of 08/15/95 3.Bill & payment report(1) 4. Bill & payment report(2) 5.Spread sheet with premium(1) 6.Spread sheet with premium(2) 7.Summary of damages. Judgment as follows:Principal $1,381,897.00, Interest $576,514.00, Costs $203.00. Counsel to prepare judgment.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
